Notice And Motion For Order That Matters Be Deemed Admitted And For The Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT SAN MATEO COUNTY TRANSIT DISTRICT's Motion For Order That Matters Be Deemed Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $196, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
